text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober hurt herself during training, so I go
to see how she's doing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You came all this way just to check on me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You didn't need to do that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to worry about me. Just think of
this as a longer-than-usual break.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't really hurt anymore, and if anything,
you fussing over me makes it harder to relax...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't really hurt anymore, and if anything,
you fussing over me makes it harder to relax...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll head back to training after resting a bit more.
You can go on ahead.
choice_data_list: No rush. Just focus on getting better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I thought you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If I rush back and it gets worse, you'll just fuss
over me even more and never leave...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I know you're worried about me, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Fine. I'll rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Fine. I'll rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober looks a little frustrated, but she
agrees to rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm not. And it's really not a big deal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A little bruise like this isn't going to stop me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ungh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Ngh. I-I don't suppose you'd believe me if I said
I was fine... Ow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she shouldn't be moving her leg yet.
Mejiro Dober is visibly crestfallen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after I leave the infirmary, Mejiro Dober
catches up with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't hurt anymore, so I shouldn't have a
problem moving around.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started. I have to make up for all the
time I lost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her injury doesn't bother her too much, so Mejiro
Dober and I restart training without pushing her
too hard!
